raw_consumer_statement:
I filed a claim against a merchant who failed to deliver the services as outlined in the contract. 

I had my last contact with the vendor and the credit card issuer ( Citibank ) today XX/XX/year>. They denied the claim saying that the service was rendered. The product they provided is inferior and unusable. 

The charges total more than {$1200.00} and I have received no benefit from the charges and it is incumbent on the merchant to supply what is listed in the contract. They have failed to do that hence the dispute.
